title: Flaky Tangy Italian Masarepa Grill
description: A tangy, flaky, energizing Italian dish featuring white masarepa, perfect for a macrobiotic-friendly breakfast or brunch. The combination of crispy, cheesy, and slightly sweet flavors will keep you coming back for more.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the masarepa and 1 cup of water. Mix well to prevent lumps.
Add the chopped parsley, mozzarella cheese, garlic, olive oil, salt, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the tops with balsamic vinegar and sprinkle with red pepper flakes.
Top each disk with a spoonful of tomato sauce, a sprinkle of mozzarella cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped basil.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and drizzle with lemon juice and sprinkle with chopped oregano.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and basil if desired.
